brain.commentary: The portfolio shows a balanced mix of bullish signals on core equity indices (SPY, QQQ, DIA) and AAPL/GOOGL, but a sizable number of flat or negative signals on high‑beta and high‑volatility assets (NVDA, TSLA, META, crypto). The overall tilt is modestly bullish, yet the presence of several fragile positions—especially the high‑beta tech names and all crypto pairs—warrants a cautious stance. We keep a neutral posture with a slight risk reduction (multiplier 0.9) and modest conviction tweaks to reinforce the strongest long ideas while dialing back exposure to the weaker, volatile signals.
